title: Minimum wage rates for 2026
body: "The Government has announced the 2026 increases to the National Minimum Wage, including the National Living Wage. These will be effective from April 2026. The Government accepted in full the recommendations of the independent Low Pay Commission (LPC).      NMW rate from April 2026 Increase (£) Increase (%)     National Living Wage (21 and over) £12.71 50p 4.1   18-20 Year Old Rate £10.85 85p 8.5   16-17 Year Old Rate £8.00 45p 6.0   Apprentice Rate £8.00 45p 6.0   Accommodation Offset £11.10 44p 4.1      Read the LPC’s press release on the 2026 rates   This page holds the LPC’s letter of advice to the Government and a short report summarising the evidence Low Pay Commissioners used to reach its recommendations. The LPC’s full annual report will be published in the new year.  "
